caption: Fig 3. Mean duration and standard errors of the gonotrophic cycles (GCs) at the experimental temperatures of \(24^{\circ}C\) , \(27^{\circ}C\) and \(30^{\circ}C\) . GC1: first gonotrophic cycle, GC2: second gonotrophic cycle, GC3: third gonotrophic cycle.
short_title: Gonotrophic cycle duration at different temperatures
source_title: Parity and Longevity of Aedes aegypti According to Temperatures in Controlled Conditions and Consequences on Dengue Transmission Risks
